testcase.name: maxCoursesTest
testcase.system-out: Calling new Degree( ) Reading the value of private static final int MAX_COURSES ~> 50 ✓

testcase.name: titleOfThesisTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Degree( ) Reading the value of private String titleOfThesis ~> "No title" Verifying that "No title" matches the expected pattern ""?No\s+title"?" ✓ ----------------------------------------------------- Comparing the return value of the getter to the value of the attribute (ignoring the visibility modifier): ----------------------------------------------------- Reading the value of private String titleOfThesis ~> "No title" Checking whether getTitleOfThesis( ) returns a String matching "No title" ~> "No title" (true) ✓ ----------------------------------------------------- Comparing the value of the attribute before and after setting a new value using the setter (ignoring the attribute's visibility modifier) ----------------------------------------------------- Reading the value of private String titleOfThesis ~> "No title" Calling setTitleOfThesis( "wuianhsf vtzotbul" ) Checking whether the value of private String titleOfThesis matches "wuianhsf vtzotbul" ~> "wuianhsf vtzotbul" (true) ✓ ----------------------------------------------------- Comparing the return value of the getter to the value of the attribute (ignoring the visibility modifier): ----------------------------------------------------- Reading the value of private String titleOfThesis ~> "wuianhsf vtzotbul" Checking whether getTitleOfThesis( ) returns a String matching "wuianhsf vtzotbul" ~> "wuianhsf vtzotbul" (true) ✓ Calling setTitleOfThesis( null ) Calling getTitleOfThesis( ) ✓ Reading the value of private String titleOfThesis ~> "wuianhsf vtzotbul" ✓

Optional, period: 2.], 1, 2026 ) Calling addStudentCourse( [108065S (41.00 cr), "syjnvrpufy". Optional, period: 2.] Year: 2026, Grade: 1.] ) Calling new Course( "bsezlnofun", 394198, 'A', 1, 4, 8.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [394198A ( 8.00 cr), "bsezlnofun". Mandatory, period: 4.], 2, 2019 ) Calling addStudentCourse( [394198A ( 8.00 cr), "bsezlnofun". Mandatory, period: 4.] Year: 2019, Grade: 2.] ) Calling new Course( "qnwyvwltog", 127785, 'S', 0, 1, 3.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [127785S ( 3.00 cr), "qnwyvwltog". Optional, period: 1.], 4, 2005 ) Calling addStudentCourse( [930804P (40.00 cr), "gcnqrlcwgo". Optional, period: 1.] Year: 2005, Grade: 4.] ) Calling toString( ) The output should match the regular expression pattern: "^Degree\[Title:"?No title"?\(courses:4\)Thesis title:"?No title"?" testcase.name: myCoursesTests
testcase.system-out:
Calling new Degree( ) Reading the value of private dev.m3s.programming2.homework2.StudentCourse[] myCourses ~> [null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null] Verifying that the default array length is 0... ✓ Calling new Course( "cauitnagru", 422598, 'A', 0, 4, 10.0, false ) Calling new StudentCourse( [422598A (10.00 cr), "cauitnagru". Optional, period: 4.], 65, 2003 ) Calling addStudentCourse( [422598A (10.00 cr), "cauitnagru". Optional, period: 4.] Year: 2003, Grade: A.] ) Calling getCourses( ) Accessing getCourses()[0]... Checking whether the two student course objects are equal: => StudentCourse 2: Reading the value of private Course course ~> [422598A (10.00 cr), "cauitnagru". Optional, period: 4.] => StudentCourse 1: Reading the value of private Course course ~> [422598A (10.00 cr), "cauitnagru". Optional, period: 4.] Checking whether the two course objects are equal: => Course 2: Reading the value of private String name ~> "cauitnagru" => Course 1: Checking whether private String name is "cauitnagru" ~> "cauitnagru" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private String courseCode ~> "422598A" => Course 1: Checking whether the value of private String courseCode matches "422598A" ~> "422598A" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private Character courseBase ~> 'A' => Course 1: Checking whether private Character courseBase is 'A' ~> 'A' (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private int period ~> 4 => Course 1: Checking whether private int period is 4 ~> 4 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private double credits ~> 10.0 => Course 1: Checking whether private double credits is 10.0 ~> 10.0 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private boolean numericGrade ~> false => Course 1: Checking whether private boolean numericGrade is false ~> false (true) ✓ => The course objects are equal.
=> StudentCourse 2: Reading the value of private int gradeNum ~> 65 => StudentCourse 1: Checking whether private int gradeNum is 65 ~> 65 (true) ✓ => StudentCourse 2: Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2003 => StudentCourse 1: Checking whether private int yearCompleted is 2003 ~> 2003 (true) ✓ => The student course objects are equal.
Reading the value of private dev.m3s.programming2.homework2.StudentCourse[] myCourses ~> [[422598A (10.00 cr), "cauitnagru". Optional, period: 4.] Year: 2003, Grade: A.], null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null] Accessing myCourses[0]... Checking whether the two student course objects are equal: => StudentCourse 2: Reading the value of private Course course ~> [422598A (10.00 cr), "cauitnagru". Optional, period: 4.] => StudentCourse 1: Reading the value of private Course course ~> [422598A (10.00 cr), "cauitnagru". Optional, period: 4.] Checking whether the two course objects are equal: => Course 2: Reading the value of private String name ~> "cauitnagru" => Course 1: Checking whether private String name is "cauitnagru" ~> "cauitnagru" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private String courseCode ~> "422598A" => Course 1: Checking whether the value of private String courseCode matches "422598A" ~> "422598A" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private Character courseBase ~> 'A' => Course 1: Checking whether private Character courseBase is 'A' ~> 'A' (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private int period ~> 4 => Course 1: Checking whether private int period is 4 ~> 4 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private double credits ~> 10.0 => Course 1: Checking whether private double credits is 10.0 ~> 10.0 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private boolean numericGrade ~> false => Course 1: Checking whether private boolean numericGrade is false ~> false (true) ✓ => The course objects are equal.
=> StudentCourse 2: Reading the value of private int gradeNum ~> 65 => StudentCourse 1: Checking whether private int gradeNum is 65 ~> 65 (true) ✓ => StudentCourse 2: Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2003 => StudentCourse 1: Checking whether private int yearCompleted is 2003 ~> 2003 (true) ✓ => The student course objects are equal.
Initializing a new array called 'newCourses' with 3 random StudentCourses: Calling new Course( "gvptrdqxjt", 27840, 'P', 1, 5, 48.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [27840P (48.00 cr), "gvptrdqxjt". Mandatory, period: 5.], 0, 2007 ) Calling new Course( "zkjtamowus", 813085, 'P', 0, 1, 19.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [813085P (19.00 cr), "zkjtamowus". Optional, period: 1.], 3, 2014 ) Calling new Course( "nkqspttord", 238853, 'A', 0, 5, 43.0, false ) Calling new StudentCourse( [238853A (43.00 cr), "nkqspttord". Optional, period: 5.], 65, 2011 ) Adding the contents of the newCourses array to the degree using addStudentCourses method... Calling addStudentCourses( [27840P (48.00 cr), "gvptrdqxjt". Mandatory, period: 5.] Year: 2007, Grade: "Not graded".], [813085P (19.00 cr), "zkjtamowus". Optional, period: 1.] Year: 2014, Grade: 3.], [238853A (43.00 cr), "nkqspttord". Optional, period: 5.] Year: 2011, Grade: A.] ) Calling getCourses( ) Each object in the newCourses array should now match the object at the next index in the myCourses array. Comparing values newCourses[0] and getCourses()[1] Checking whether the two student course objects are equal: => StudentCourse 2: Reading the value of private Course course ~> [27840P (48.00 cr), "gvptrdqxjt". Mandatory, period: 5.] => StudentCourse 1: Reading the value of private Course course ~> [27840P (48.00 cr), "gvptrdqxjt". Mandatory, period: 5.] Checking whether the two course objects are equal: => Course 2: Reading the value of private String name ~> "gvptrdqxjt" => Course 1: Checking whether private String name is "gvptrdqxjt" ~> "gvptrdqxjt" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private String courseCode ~> "27840P" => Course 1: Checking whether the value of private String courseCode matches "27840P" ~> "27840P" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private Character courseBase ~> 'P' => Course 1: Checking whether private Character courseBase is 'P' ~> 'P' (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private int period ~> 5 => Course 1: Checking whether private int period is 5 ~> 5 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private double credits ~> 48.0 => Course 1: Checking whether private double credits is 48.0 ~> 48.0 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private boolean numericGrade ~> true => Course 1: Checking whether private boolean numericGrade is true ~> true (true) ✓ => The course objects are equal.
=> StudentCourse 2: Reading the value of private int gradeNum ~> 0 => StudentCourse 1: Checking whether private int gradeNum is 0 ~> 0 (true) ✓ => StudentCourse 2: Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2007 => StudentCourse 1: Checking whether private int yearCompleted is 2007 ~> 2007 (true) ✓ => The student course objects are equal.
Comparing values newCourses[0] and myCourses[1] Checking whether the two student course objects are equal: => StudentCourse 2: Reading the value of private Course course ~> [27840P (48.00 cr), "gvptrdqxjt". Mandatory, period: 5.] => StudentCourse 1: Reading the value of private Course course ~> [27840P (48.00 cr), "gvptrdqxjt". Mandatory, period: 5.] Checking whether the two course objects are equal: => Course 2: Reading the value of private String name ~> "gvptrdqxjt" => Course 1: Checking whether private String name is "gvptrdqxjt" ~> "gvptrdqxjt" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private String courseCode ~> "27840P" => Course 1: Checking whether the value of private String courseCode matches "27840P" ~> "27840P" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private Character courseBase ~> 'P' => Course 1: Checking whether private Character courseBase is 'P' ~> 'P' (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private int period ~> 5 => Course 1: Checking whether private int period is 5 ~> 5 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private double credits ~> 48.0 => Course 1: Checking whether private double credits is 48.0 ~> 48.0 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private boolean numericGrade ~> true => Course 1: Checking whether private boolean numericGrade is true ~> true (true) ✓ => The course objects are equal.
=> StudentCourse 2: Reading the value of private int gradeNum ~> 0 => StudentCourse 1: Checking whether private int gradeNum is 0 ~> 0 (true) ✓ => StudentCourse 2: Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2007 => StudentCourse 1: Checking whether private int yearCompleted is 2007 ~> 2007 (true) ✓ => The student course objects are equal.
Comparing values newCourses[1] and getCourses()[2] Checking whether the two student course objects are equal: => StudentCourse 2: Reading the value of private Course course ~> [813085P (19.00 cr), "zkjtamowus". Optional, period: 1.] => StudentCourse 1: Reading the value of private Course course ~> [813085P (19.00 cr), "zkjtamowus". testcase.name: degreeTitleTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Degree( ) Reading the value of private String degreeTitle ~> "No title" Verifying that "No title" matches the expected pattern ""?No\s+title"?" ✓ ----------------------------------------------------- Comparing the return value of the getter to the value of the attribute (ignoring the visibility modifier): ----------------------------------------------------- Reading the value of private String degreeTitle ~> "No title" Checking whether getDegreeTitle( ) returns a String matching "No title" ~> "No title" (true) ✓ ----------------------------------------------------- Comparing the value of the attribute before and after setting a new value using the setter (ignoring the attribute's visibility modifier) ----------------------------------------------------- Reading the value of private String degreeTitle ~> "No title" Calling setDegreeTitle( "uhrgkdmd taqjdgdz" ) Checking whether the value of private String degreeTitle matches "uhrgkdmd taqjdgdz" ~> "uhrgkdmd taqjdgdz" (true) ✓ ----------------------------------------------------- Comparing the return value of the getter to the value of the attribute (ignoring the visibility modifier): ----------------------------------------------------- Reading the value of private String degreeTitle ~> "uhrgkdmd taqjdgdz" Checking whether getDegreeTitle( ) returns a String matching "uhrgkdmd taqjdgdz" ~> "uhrgkdmd taqjdgdz" (true) ✓ Calling setDegreeTitle( null ) Calling getDegreeTitle( ) ✓ Reading the value of private String degreeTitle ~> "uhrgkdmd taqjdgdz" ✓
